Transcript: Hi this is Marilyn Shirley calling to invite you to a very exciting event on Sunday February 15th. Jack Layton will be nominated as a federal candidate in Toronto down fourth. It begins at 5:00 p.m. at the Upper House at 735 Queen Street East. We also plan to canvass every household in the riding. Earlier in the day for more information call 4 1 6 5 9 1 5 4 5 5 Extension 2 3 3. Hope to see you there.
